---
title: "Lyrics"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
hot100_top10 <- read_csv("hot100_top10.csv")
```


```{r}
lines <- hot100_top10 %>%
  separate_rows(lyrics, sep = "\n") %>% filter(lyrics != "")

line_counts <- lines %>% 
  count(rank, year, artist, title, lyrics, sort = TRUE) %>% filter(n != 1)

```

```{r}
count_title_repeats = function(lyrics, title) {
  
  if (is.na(lyrics) | is.na(title)) return(NA_integer_)
  
  lyrics_clean = tolower(lyrics)
  title_clean  = tolower(title)
  
  # remove punctuation
  lyrics_clean = stringr::str_replace_all(lyrics_clean, "[^a-z0-9\\s]", "")
  title_clean  = stringr::str_replace_all(title_clean, "[^a-z0-9\\s]", "")
  
  count = stringr::str_count(lyrics_clean, stringr::fixed(title_clean))
  
  return(count)
}
hot100_top10 = hot100_top10 %>%
  mutate(title_repeat_count = mapply(count_title_repeats, lyrics, title))
```
